CustomField.formula:
If ( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Airbus', leaseworks__Aircraft_Basic_Price__c - leaseworks__Airframe_Credit_Memorandum__c - leaseworks__Fleet_Transition_Credit_Memorandum__c - leaseworks__Promotion_Credit_Memorandum__c - leaseworks__Airbus_Financing_Credit_Memorandum__c - leaseworks__CFM_Engine_Credit__c - leaseworks__Engine_Financing_Credit_Memorandum__c
, leaseworks__Total_Credits__c + leaseworks__Total_w_o_BFE_SPE__c )
CustomField.label: Final Aircraft Price
